use_cases: Collecting phone numbers in contact forms during user registration or onboarding flows
Phone number input in checkout and shipping forms for e-commerce orders
Contact information capture in healthcare appointment booking systems
Phone input in customer support ticketing or inquiry forms
Two-factor authentication or SMS verification input fields
ai_summary: A specialized phone input component with customizable variants (default, destructive, ghost) and sizes (sm, default, lg, xl). Features optional left/right icons, clearable functionality, password visibility toggle, and error state handling. Built with Tailwind CSS and class-variance-authority for consistent theming across applications requiring phone number collection.
